patch.value: dry-run / include-done flags ignored due to kebab-case option read (option normalization)

Symptom: pm standup --dry-run errored with missing_webhook instead of dry-running; --include-done had no effect. Repro: pm standup --dry-run (no webhook). Observed: 'No webhook URL provided' (dryRun=false). Expected: prints message, no POST, exit 0. Root cause: code read ctx.options['dry-run']/['include-done'] but pm normalizes flags to camelCase (dryRun/includeDone), so kebab keys were always undefined. Fix: readBoolOption/readStrOption read both kebab+camelCase forms. Proven live: dry-run prints + no POST even with webhook set; include-done surfaces Done Today; format text + channel take effect.
Fixed: readBoolOption/readStrOption read both kebab+camelCase; flags verified live.
